more.title: How the Skeleton of Mutapa Times is Based on Sarah Charlesworth's Work
more.description: Conceptual artist Sarah Charlesworth's 1979 study of how newspapers covered a solar eclipse inspired the framework behind The Mutapa Times.

more.title: Your familiarity with soldiers does not make you a soldier – Mliswa warned, as disgruntled generals dig in on illegal Constitutional Amendment
more.description: RETIRED Lieutenant General Winston Sigauke Mapuranga, one of the disgruntled senior officers in Zimbabwe’s army who has raised issues with President Emmerson Mnangagwa’s plans to illegally extend his stay until 2030, has warned former legislator Temba Mliswa not to misinterpret his proximity to power. The post Your familiarity with soldiers does not make you a soldier – Mliswa warned, as disgruntled generals dig in on illegal Constitutional Amendment appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com .
